>Description:
In a previous commit graphics/py-openimageio was made a slave to graphics/openimageio. The step of deleting the files used from the master port was skipped.

The following actions should be done -

rm graphics/py-openimageio/distinfo
rm graphics/py-openimageio/pkg-descr
rm graphics/py-openimageio/files/patch-src_CMakeLists.txt
rmdir graphics/py-openimageio/files

Leaving only Makefile in graphics/py-openimageio.
